narrative_seed_by_week.1: What is computation — deterministic vs probabilistic systems / Why AI gives different answers to the same question / Decomposition — breaking a big problem into smaller solvable parts / Abstraction — hiding complexity at the right level / Pseudocode and flowcharts — writing logic before writing code / Algorithmic thinking — recipes, GPS routes, sorting queues

lab_activity_seed_by_week.1: Draw flowcharts for 2 real-world tasks using Excalidraw / Swap with a partner — can they follow it exactly? / Choose your domain — the problem area you will build toward all semester. Write a 3-sentence problem statement. / Decompose the problem into a task tree using Excalidraw / AI Decision Journal — Entry #1: what does solving this problem currently require of a human?
